catalog.delivery_zone_error: We don't deliver to that ZIP yet — call us at {phone}.

hero.title: Romance, by the stem.
hero.sub: Signature arrangements, hand-built daily under our hot-pink arch on Hempstead Turnpike.

home.marquee: DIVA FLOWERS · ROMANCE BY THE STEM · LONG ISLAND · DESDE 2014 · ENVÍOS HOY · SAME-DAY DELIVERY

bento.subscriptions_body: A new arrangement at your door every week. Pause anytime.

editorial_split.title: Built around our floral arch on Hempstead Turnpike.
editorial_split.body: We've been arranging flowers under the same pink awning since 2014. Walk in, call ahead, or order online — same-day delivery across Long Island and Queens.

events.page_description: Corporate and recurring floral design for restaurants, offices, galleries, and private events on Long Island.
events.hero_alt: Elegant floral installation at a corporate event by Diva Flowers
events.hero_title: Flowers that work as hard as you do.
events.hero_sub: From weekly office arrangements to press-day installations — we design and deliver, on schedule.

restaurants.title: Restaurants
restaurants.body: Weekly table arrangements and bar displays that match your menu, season, and service style — refreshed on a schedule that fits your operations.

offices.title: Offices
offices.body: Lobby installations, reception arrangements, and meeting-room centerpieces that make your team and clients feel the care that goes into your space.

galleries.title: Galleries
galleries.body: Opening-night florals and run-of-show arrangements designed to complement the work on the wall — not compete with it.

private.title: Private Events
private.body: Dinner parties, birthday dinners, and at-home celebrations — fully styled florals for the moments that matter most.

press.title: Press Days
press.body: Product launch florals, press-kit styling, and photogenic arrangements built to perform in every frame of coverage.

hotels.title: Hotels
hotels.body: Lobby anchors, suite amenity florals, and event-room installs — managed weekly or for peak seasons, always on time.

consult.title: Consult
consult.body: We learn your space, brand, and cadence — then build a floral program that fits your operations without creating extra work for your team.

design.title: Design
design.body: We develop a signature look for your venue or event, complete with stem selections, color palette, and a detailed service agreement.

source.title: Source
source.body: Every delivery is built from fresh stems sourced weekly to match the season — never generic, always specific to your look.

install.title: Install
install.body: We arrive, set everything, and remove spent arrangements — you handle your business while we handle the flowers.

form.title: Let's build your floral program.
form.body: Tell us about your space and cadence. We'll follow up within one business day with a proposal.
form.name: Contact name
form.brief: Tell us about your space and vision
form.success_body: Thank you for reaching out. We typically respond within one business day with a custom proposal.

errors.unknown_error: Something went wrong. Please try again or call us directly.

weddings.meta_description: Full-service wedding florals on Long Island. Arches, tablescapes, bouquets, and installations — hand-built by Diva Flowers.
weddings.hero_alt: Cascading floral arch installation by Diva Flowers
weddings.hero_sub: From intimate ceremonies to grand receptions — we design and install every stem.

process.title: Four steps to your perfect day.

consult.title: Consult
consult.body: We sit down with you to understand your vision, venue, and budget — then shape a floral direction that feels entirely yours.

design.title: Design
design.body: Our team develops a full floral proposal: mood boards, stem counts, and a detailed quote — no guesswork.

source.title: Source
source.body: We hand-pick every stem from our trusted network of farms, selecting for peak bloom on your wedding day.

install.title: Install
install.body: Our crew arrives early, sets every arrangement, and stays through ceremony to make sure everything is perfect.

pricing.statement_full: Every wedding is priced to the proposal — no packages, no surprises.
pricing.statement_personal: We build a detailed quote after your consultation so you know exactly what you're getting and what it costs.

form.name: Full name
form.source: How did you hear about us?
form.success_body: Thank you for reaching out. We typically respond within one business day.

errors.unknown_error: Something went wrong. Please try again or call us directly.
